nyheter.summary: Hanwha Philly Shipyard will build a new missile-range instrumentation vessel for the U.S. Navy that will support the Trump administration’s Golden Dome effort, White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russ Vought announced Friday. Dubbed the “Golden Defender,” the ship is based on the National Security Multi-Mission Vessel design that Hanwha is finishing for the U.S. Maritime Administration’s training ships. nyheter.title: Spanish Navy to Lead NATO’s Atlantic Task Force Until June 2027
nyheter.summary: The Spanish Navy has assumed command of NATO’s naval force dedicated to patrolling the North Atlantic and will lead the force for the next year, NATO announced Tuesday. From July of 2026 to June of 2027, NATO’s Commander Task Force Atlantic (CTF-AT) will be led by five Spanish ships, the Spanish Marine Corps landing force and eight ships from allied nations. nyheter.summary: Amphibious transport dock USS Fort Lauderdale (LPD-28) pulled into Naval Station Norfolk on Thursday, capping off a nearly year-long deployment in the Caribbean, the Navy announced. nyheter.title: Coast Guard Ends Middle East Mission, Moves Cutter Squadron to Western Pacific
nyheter.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard is transitioning its Patrol Forces Southwest Asia (PATFORSWA) to the Western Pacific, ending a more than 20-year forward-deployed mission in the Middle East. The Coast Guard’s Expeditionary Cutter Squadron that makes up PATFORSWA, which was previously forward deployed to Bahrain, will instead operate from Guam and the Pacific Islands, the service announced Wednesday. Saildrone and Blue Water Autonomy filed suit in late June in the United States Court of Federal Claims in Washington, D.C., with two separate complaints alleging the Navy didn’t follow its own rules in how it selected contenders for the first generation of larger autonomous vessels. nyheter.title: Cahill Takes Command of U.S. Naval Surface Force
nyheter.summary: Vice Adm. Joe Cahill took over as the Navy’s top surface warfare officer earlier this month, USNI News has learned. Cahill, who most recently was the commander of Naval Surface Force Atlantic, took the helm of U.S. Naval Surface Force on July 3, according to a service news release. Cahill succeeds Vice Adm. nyheter.title: MARAD Ship Suffers Fire in Baltimore
